entry.title: Deleted Payment Draft Change Log

Please help confirm there is no way to trace who and when Payment Drafts or other Documents Drafts are Deleted right?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: VLMS On Mobile
entry.content: Do we have Validated LMS on Mobile app ? if Yes it is for only user or Admin Centre activities also can be accessed ?

entry.title: How to automate the headers in SAP Disclosure Management
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to automate the Headers with the name of the entity so that whenever I generate a report the entity name should get refreshed automatically in the header also.  

Looking for immediate help in this case.

Thanks in advance!

SAP Disclosure Management 

@Marc_Kuipers

entry.title: Before created AP Invoice , Sale was made then Impact of G/L account SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding on G/L account, Stock account, Stock while sale was made before making actual AP Invoice.

Issue : One GRPO is created and Few delivery is created here based on GRPO.  

Here, AP Invoice is not created for that GRPO. Need to understanding the effect of G/L account, Stock account, Stock.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: Writing Blogs, Technical Documentation, and Creating Project Structures

Thank you, @KatherineKenneally. 🙂
Yes that's my trophy from when I was part of SAP! 🏆

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Screen Personas - Field cannot be moved
entry.content:
As Tamas says there was a note released that focused on this issue.

I have however still found this issue when using the "Design Mode" in RF (CTRL-SHIFT-F2) where you can see all fields on a screen. Some fields (only a few) are not changed if you do changes in Personas in this mode. You have then run the screen normally and move/change those fields..

We still have issues with dumps with RF + Personas Editor and some other things but the bugs have become fewer in each release so do the "health check" regularly!

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Development Kit(MDK) Offline with Offline OData Service
entry.content:
Hello @Jitendra_Kansal

i have  developed an application which has pages that are designed with extensions. in offline mode, Form Cell Registered Extension Control are not displaying .   it giving an alert message (Failed to fetch "java.net.UnknownHostException" unable to resolve host ."no address associated with hostname).

thank you.

Do you know any specific thing which can cause this issue?

Thanks,

Onkar

entry.title: Weighted Average formula for Production Order Creation using BOM or Recipe in SAP PP
entry.content:
Hii Team,

I am at waste management Industries facing issue to Weighting Average for BOM or recipe preparation, We have multiple RM for 1 FG , but before starting production Process, we have to select manual BOM through weighting avg formula of the MIC's which are recorded at the time of GR for incoming material.

 

Currently, there is customized T-Code for the process.

 

But we want to process it in SAP Best Practice or in SAP standard way.

 

Please suggest process which includes same.

 

Your suggestion will be highly appreciated.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: can we count direct reports by business rules ?
entry.content: You can try to implement this in integration center providing the number into the MDF portlet and an onsave rule checking if one of the directs has a different company. I am a bit unsure if the business rule can check the "array" of directs. Because according to your description as long as one user has a different company you can set one field to true instead of adding the number of directs

entry.title: Re: Aggregation of rate elements with rate subelements Su...
entry.content:
Hi Elena,

a) In order to configure an output column in a lookup table, you will need a field defined in the field catalog. You can choose to create a new one or reuse an existing field. I recommend keeping the number of fields as low as possible through maximum reuse. However, it's important not to reuse a field that has a different business meaning attached to it. Since blocksize represents the size of a block typically used for block pricing of usage (e.g. API calls which are priced in blocks of 1000 calls), it would be best to create a new field called "minimumQuantity" with a proper description.

Then, create a new lookup table with "minimumQuantity" as an output column. You can decide to define it with only the minimumQuantity as output or include both the minimumQuantity and the price condition. The choice between these two approaches depends on factors such as reuse, understandability of the pricing tree, and data maintenance. Typically, I would prefer the single table approach as it allows for the maintenance of the minimum quantity together with the prices.

c) I would recommend leaving the predefined content untouched and creating a new price element specification, for example, by copying the existing UsagePrice (e.g. "UsagePriceMinQuant") and then using this in the pricing scheme instead of "Usage Price".


Best
Carsten

entry.title: Re: Error in Condition Contract Settlement Pricing DIFF Condition types for Rounding off the Gross V

entry.title: Delete logs from table DBTABLOG with report RSTBPDEL
entry.content:
Hi

I have executed this report in background and the job was canceled with a runtime error. 

Job log overview:

```

Internal session terminated with a runtime error COMPUTE_INT_PLUS_OVERFLOW (see ST22)

```

and ST22 shows:
```
The current ABAP program "CL_STAB_DELETE_TABL_CHANGE_LOGCP" had to be
terminated because it found a
statement that could not be executed.
```

I can not find any information about this ABAP program "CL_STAB_DELETE_TABL_CHANGE_LOGCP" in sap notes.

entry.title: Re: ES接口数据创建时间如何更改为用户所在时区
entry.content: 你好，通过接口创建的数据在后台存储的会是UTC时间，在前台展示会根据用户的时区不同展示用户所在时区的时间。

entry.title: Is it possible to use own IdP User for SAP HANA CLOUD DB User?
entry.content:
Hi,

We set up an own IDP and a HANA Cloud DB app +instance on SAP BTP.

SSO is possible for the APP, and it just need the user created on IdP.

But my question is if it is possible to reuse/synchronize this user also as DB User. From what I understand now its only possible with LDAP.

Any tips?

Thanks in advance!

SAP HANA Cloud SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP Cloud Identity Services

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori: How to find out Application Name & Applica...
entry.content:
Finally I got the things, 

The way i find is followed the below the process

01. Firstly i enabled all things in sandbox
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/6d52de87aa0d4fb6a90924720a5b0549/f691242bc626461984f15c9684fe2fa5.html?locale=en-US

02. Then after i find required fiori Apps & APP ID by following this video 
https://youtu.be/TDjs-Bjcfb4?si=SQeQk6Px7flOWpFM

03. Then after in check in fiori app name in library website 
https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/ 

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: Why isn't the actual value changing after the O2C process?
Re: Whene can I download the note 142902
entry.content:
Hello @SteveChen 

Use this link https://me.sap.com/notes/142902

You need to log in with authorized S-user.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
ABAP Cloud is the powerful development model for clean core compliant, cloud-ready business applications, services, and extensions.
In this session, we will demonstrate how the 3-tier extensibility model helps you to consume BAPIs with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA.

Speakers : Manikandan Rajasekaran and Vignesh Subramanian

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Calculated measure in the model of previous year not working properly
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm facing the issue when I'm trying to create a calculate measure in my planning model. I would like to present an amount of the previous year in all my stories, but also divided properly for quaters and months. This is the formula I wrote:

 

And this is the result:

So as you can see, it returns the amount for the whole year also in quaters and months.

I tried also this formula, but the result is the same:

 

It works properly with restricted measure if I create it in story, so I wonder what can cause the issue and what should I change in my formula to have it working properly??

entry.title: Re: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
Both 5XU and 1J2 comes with communication scenarios . Make sure you enable them . Refer set up instruction documents for respective countries 

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-055/2022/SolP/1J2?region=AE

entry.title: Re: Migrating Workflows to Build Process Automation
entry.content: What is the update released on August 16th you refer to?

entry.title: Batch managed tick at plant level in ERP not flowing to EWM via ALE Idoc
entry.content:
Hello,

We have SAP ERP 6 EHP6 version wherein Batch is set at Plant level.

We are linking SAP EWM Decentralised 2309 version to SAP ERP wherein we have also set Batch at Plant level same as ERP.

We are transferring Batch managed products from ERP to EWM via ALE idoc but Batch managed tick at plant level is not flowing from ERP to EWM.

In EWM, we can see Batch managed indicator set on material master in MM03 but Batch managed indicator is not set in Warehouse product in /SCWM/MAT1.

What can be reason for this and how can we set this?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: CG12 export produce # for some language in the applic...
entry.content:
Hello

these strange characters can show up if you do the export "wrong". 

BUT we know other reasons as well. Some months ago we have realized an issue in "import". For that SAP has provided a fix (i belive character 76 or so was deleted durign the import)

I assume: you use a "UNIX" OS for your SAP system? Please decribe the steps as donw for the export; there is (if i remember correct) as well a "environmental parameter"for export; you must make sure to use "UNICODE" option

C.B.

PS: https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/ehs-import-specifications-phrases-reports-etc-error-code-utf8-2-utf16/qaq-p/619257 could be of interest

entry.title: Re: Navigation key Issues for roles and tasks from PPM items
entry.content: Check your PPM Navigation configuration. I found that these two navigations were missing. When I added them my navigation to Task or Roles in PPM Item detail screen works again

entry.title: Re: Date Validation for PO
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

This is not supported in standard scope.

Would you please find BAdI below and add custom logic?

For example you can compare the value of sys-date and PO creation date.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/8676e556cca85267e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: B1iF - Update UDF's not working
entry.content:
I have create a really simple step in the Integrations Framework, which should update two UDF's in a purchase order in company B, if the fields were updateded in a purchase order in company A.

This is the Payload and the result of B1 Object:

<vpf:Payload xmlns:vpf="urn:com.sap.b1i.vplatform:entity" Role="X" id="atom5" ts="2024/08/22 08:28:15">

<OPOR xmlns="">
<row>
<DocEntry>54991</DocEntry>
</row>
</OPOR>
<POR1 xmlns="">
<row>
<LineNum>2</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635101</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>N</U_Labprue>
</row>
<row>
<LineNum>3</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635102</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>Y</U_Labprue>
</row>
<row>
<LineNum>4</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635103</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>N</U_Labprue>
</row>
<row>
<LineNum>5</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635104</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>N</U_Labprue>
</row>
</POR1>
</vpf:Payload>
<Payload Role="C" id="atom4" system="0010000250" status="success" b1login="Technical User" method="Synchronous Update" objectid="22" payload="atom5" keyname="DocEntry" keyvalue="54991" DIresult="success" DImsg=""/>

If does not work correct. It updates the pruchase order in company A, but change no value, as you can see in the change log of the document:

Is something missing in the payload to update a purchase order? Any suggestions why the fields are not updated?

 

Regards

Marco

entry.title: Re: From Monday Blues to Data Delights: My Geeky Hobby :)
entry.content:
Hi bhavinvyas,

That sounds like a great way to unwind! Exploring analytics, improving data models, and sharing insights through blogs and LinkedIn must be both rewarding and fun. It’s impressive how you turn a busy week into something so productive and enjoyable.

Best,
Azmath.

entry.title: Re: MDG DQM derivation for BP role
entry.content:
Hi @MDG,

 

Hard to give you an answer with the provided info; just some hints:

  • Is your derivation scenario approved?
  • Is your rule approved? If not, go in "edit" mode and change its status to "Approved"
  • Is your rule enabled? In the detail screen of your derivation scenario, the "Execution" switch should be green for the desired derivation rule.

 

This guide covers all the steps required to setup a derivation scenario to be used in MDG Central Governance; I'd suggest to use it for your reference.

 

Best,

R.

entry.title: Re: implement a custom application that can scan QR codes...
entry.content: Hi @dennis_koehler .. In local run on BAS and after Deployed in Cloud foundry It worked, open the camera, but don't open it in after configured to FLP tile means SAP Build Work Zone.... I'm getting error like this........... BarcodeScanner.loadZXingCPPInstance: can not load wasm lib instance of ZXingCPP. RuntimeError: Aborted(CompileError: WebAssembly.instantiate(): Refused to compile or instantiate WebAssembly module because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:"). Build with -sASSERTIONS for more info.

entry.title: Re: EWM: Bulk Storage Unblock Putaway
entry.content: Thanks for help, it's working.

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM Health Monitoring on-premise CI
entry.content: Hi Paula, Thank you for your reaction. CI mean standalone Central Instance system ASCS. I Health Monitoring is visible only ABAP system of primary instance, but I need monitor some OS KPIs like disk, CPU, system availability of distributed instances like Central Instace etc. Regards Jakub

entry.title: Re: BKPF-XBLNR (Reference Field is not changeable)
entry.content:
Hi @sachin_thombre 

The change rules are specified in the below configuration:

Financial Accounting > Financial Accounting Global Settings > Document > Line Item > Document Change Rules

However, a PO would generally not have an accounting document. It would be great if you can specify in a bit more details the type of accounting journal. Also check if this is a direct post through an interface.

Thanks & Best Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: SEVT TABLE DELETING OLD DATA
entry.content: The table sevt stores all event for B1iF. The event sender process all entries from this table and hand it over to B1iF. After successfull processing the event will be deleted from sevt.

entry.title: variables in the Analytical Model and how can I implement them in my data models?
entry.content:
SAP has introduced several key updates to variables within the Analytical Model in SAP Datasphere. These updates include:

 

  • Using Standard Variables in Calculated Measures: You can now implement standard variables directly within calculated measures, making your models more flexible and dynamic.
  • Renaming Source Variables: Source variables can now be renamed to standard variables, which helps in maintaining consistency across models.
  • Data Type Checks: The system now includes enhanced data type verification, ensuring that the selected data types are appropriate for the variables used in your models.

Why These Updates Matter:

These updates are essential for improving the accuracy and consistency of your data models. By incorporating these changes, you can enhance your data analysis capabilities and reduce the risk of errors due to data type mismatches.

How to Implement the Updates:

Implementing Standard Variables in Calculated Measures:

  1. To use standard variables in your calculated measures, go to your model settings, Create a Calculated Measure and select the relevant standard variable from the dropdown list.
  2. Ensure that the variable aligns with the measure you are calculating to avoid logical inconsistencies.

Renaming Source Variables:

SAP has automatically renamed certain source variables to standard variables to ensure consistency across different models.

Verifying and Selecting Data Types:

After updating your variables, check the data types to confirm they are suitable for your model’s requirements.

This step is crucial to avoid any data type mismatch errors that could affect the performance of your models.

Conclusion: These updates significantly enhance the functionality and reliability of your analytical models in SAP Datasphere. By following the steps above, you can seamlessly integrate these changes into your workflow, ensuring that your models are both accurate and efficient.

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Re: Batch managed tick at plant level in ERP not flowing...
entry.content:
Hello @onkar_jadhav91 

Material master data is typically transferred from ERP to EWM with reduced MATMAS IDocs. Reduced means that only selected segments of MATMAS IDoc and selected fields are transferred.

Start with checking what ALE message is used in your case and verify if the message contains required fields. ALE message reduction is defined in BD53.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Offline Price Update for Purchasing Info Record via Microsoft Excel
entry.content:
Hello,

Can we upload mass change for new prices for purchasing material  for specific vendor .

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to change warning message to error message

We have tried to do this from SSCUI 103887 but system is not opening application area F5 and showing error as enter a valid value within the allowed work area.

entry.title: Re: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
I assume the communication scenarios have been enabled, it seems to be a prerequisite to activate 1J2 (as shown in the documentation available in Signavio).

Could you please explain how enabling communication scenarios would allow VAT report previews?

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Supplier Company and Customer Compan...

entry.title: Re: Batch managed tick at plant level in ERP not flowing...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for your reply.

Yes we are using reduced message type to transfer materials from ERP to EWM.

Even we are transferring field MARC -XCHPF to EWM and EWM is receiving this value as X in this field in EWM but still system is not updating Batch management indicator in Warehouse product.

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to change warning message to error m...
entry.content:
Hi ,

We also have the similar requirement to convert message no. 192 in application area F5. We have done the config in SSCUI 101923 but it doesn't work. It is not converted to error. However, this is working perfectly fine in on premise OBA5 T code. 

 

We have tried to do this from SSCUI 103887 but system is not opening application area F5 and showing error as enter a valid value within the allowed work area.

Kindly advise.

entry.title: Re: SFAPI CPI No space left on device
entry.content: Still getting same error

entry.title: Configuration Tab missing in PDS screen (/n/SAPAPO/CURTO_SIMU transaction)
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I am using S4 Hana ePPDS. I have an issue with a material where I am not able to see configuration tab in the PDS screen (/SAPAPO/CURTO_SIMU). I tried to see documentation on SAP Help but could not find it. I want to know by which field/tab in material master, this tab is influenced in PDS transaction. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Traceability_Scrap quantity in In process Inspection...
entry.content: Hi Prabha, Many thanks for your advise. Is there any material document generated for the scrap quantity recorded.. Please advise on this as well. Thank you, Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
@ShaleneK 

Hi,

is that off-day a holiday? Because if so you can use the "Holiday Working Pattern" Object. That is actually the same requisition that I have and I could temporarily (!) solve it that way. The only drawback is that I would always work like that with no exception.

If is not a holiday you could use a temporary workschedule for now - which is also not a longtime solution.

The thing is if it is a holiday, there is no way to lookup the actual working hours. I have tried multiple ways but it will always return 0.

The only I idea the I haven´t tried yet is to create a custom field and store it in the job information. This field then holds the hours per day. Frankly that only works in cases where the working times are equally each day. Unfortunately a lookup doesn´t work in that rule. However you can access the job information portlet but not the work schedule information on that - which would actually solve that problem.

I think that would be worth a customer influence request 🙂

KR Jan

entry.title: Re: How to Add Predefined Values to the ADSMTP-REMARK Fie...
entry.content:
Did you already look for an enhancement point to handle a dropdown list?

  • Use FM such as VRM_SET_VALUES
  • Look at start/end of forms such as dynpro_output or d0600_display_line or even FM ADDR_COMM_DIALOG_INTERNET
  • Use LOOP AT SCREEN to set SCREEN-VALUES_IN_COMBO for the field

entry.title: OEE Trends Report in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to create an OEE Trend report where we can see the trend of different OEE KPIs. We are unable to achieve this and wanted to confirm a few points-

Questions:

  • We don't see any APIs for fetching real-time and historical data for OEE KPIs. How should we fetch the data related to OEE KPIs?
  • Do we have Read/Write access for MDOs which we can use to create Stored Procedures? If yes, then if stored procedures are created, will it be available in SAP DM “Manage Dashboard” app under the available list of MDOs.
  • Are there any alternatives to fetching data from API OR creating stored procedures in MDO to achieve an OEE Trend Report?

Any help will be of great value. Please let me know if more clarity is required on this topic.

Thanks & Regards,
Harsh.

entry.title: Re: Variant Configuration - Object Dependencies - CEIL Fu...

entry.title: How to create a Snapshot of the KF projectedinventory?
entry.content:
Hello all, 

when I want to create a snapshot of the KF projectedinventory I can´t activate the planning area because of the output planning level wkprodlocnouomto. I tried to avoid it by creating a new KF that is only displaying the values of projected stock on wkprodloc level. There I have the issue, that not the last value of a split week is displayed. 

Do you have any idea which way I could try to create a snaphot of projected stock?

I would really appreciate suggestions in order to make it work.

entry.title: Activate the Sales Order Header field VBAK-KNUMA in VA01 and VA02 transactions
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

    I need to activate the Sales Order Header field VBAK-KNUMA in VA01 and VA02 transactions so that it becomes available for update. The field shows in VA03 though and in VA02 in display mode only. In VA01 its not available at all. Hence, any update using IDOC is not possible even when we pass the correct qualifier. I tried doing it using the transaction SHD0, but I was unable to find the field for the screen variants for SAPMV45A. Any suggestions for achieving it would be really helpful.

Thanks for your help in advance.

Regards

Anustup Chakrabarti

entry.title: Re: add new items to an existing outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi Eyal,

I used this FM '/SPE/OUTB_DLV_CHG_ITEMS_INSERT' and i successfully added a new article line item to an existing delivery. 

But in my case the Picking Quantity is showing as 0 , even i passed PIKMG field value in to the  lt_new_items. And status is showing as Partially Picked . Please suggest me , what else i need to pass? Below are the screen shots , for what all i passed to the FM , do i need to add any flags , please suggest me some solution.

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Operational Workforce Planning
entry.content: Great updates to the Business Content; keep 'em coming!

entry.title: Variables in Analytic Model; Standard Variables in Calculated Measures
entry.content:
SAP has introduced several key updates to variables within the Analytical Model in SAP Datasphere. These updates include:

  • Using Standard Variables in Calculated Measures: You can now implement standard variables directly within calculated measures, making your models more flexible and dynamic.
  • Renaming Source Variables: Source variables can now be renamed to standard variables, which helps in maintaining consistency across models.
  • Data Type Checks: The system now includes enhanced data type verification, ensuring that the selected data types are appropriate for the variables used in your models.

Why These Updates Matter:

These updates are essential for improving the accuracy and consistency of your data models. By incorporating these changes, you can enhance your data analysis capabilities and reduce the risk of errors due to data type mismatches.

How to Implement the Updates:

Implementing Standard Variables in Calculated Measures:

  • To use standard variables in your calculated measures, go to your model settings, Create a Calculated Measure and select the relevant standard variable from the dropdown list.
  • Ensure that the variable aligns with the measure you are calculating to avoid logical inconsistencies.

 

Renaming Source Variables:

SAP has automatically renamed certain source variables to standard variables to ensure consistency across different models.

 

Verifying and Selecting Data Types:

  • After updating your variables, check the data types to confirm they are suitable for your model’s requirements.
  • This step is crucial to avoid any data type mismatch errors that could affect the performance of your models.

 

Conclusion: These updates significantly enhance the functionality and reliability of your analytical models in SAP Datasphere. By following the steps above, you can seamlessly integrate these changes into your workflow, ensuring that your models are both accurate and efficient.

SAP Datasphere 

SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: week 2 - Completed

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Supplier Company and Customer Compan...
entry.content:
I would like to share the results of my investigation over the past few months. I have completed a significant portion, with only a few minor details remaining.

Firstly, the Business Partner (A2X) does not support the Credit Memo Payment Term. However, the Business Partner - Replicate from Client to SAP S/4HANA Cloud does support it.

Throughout the investigation, I encountered many challenges, so I would like to explain the process. I used the tool SoapUI to investigate all the items. Although the official samples provided significant assistance, there were still many unclear aspects. By importing the WSDL files provided by the API into SoapUI and automatically generating the complete SOAP, I was able to trim it down according to the required items.

One important point to note is that in the MessageHeader of the SOAP items, the SenderBusinessSystemID and RecipientBusinessSystemID must be filled in with the Business System you entered in the Communication Systems in S/4HANA Cloud. Otherwise, an error will appear in the SOAP Error Log.

There’s not much left to say, but I do need to mention one last thing, which is also a new issue I’ve encountered. Since I am using SAP BTP’s iFlow to integrate all the data, the successful sending of this SOAP API does not return a response (For example, if the SOAP you send conforms to the SOAP format but the data does not comply with S/4 rules). In such cases, iFlow will indicate that it has completed, but S/4 will report an error, indicating that the SOAP transmission failed and the data could not be properly imported. This issue is still under investigation. If anyone has any solutions, I would appreciate discussing them together. Thanks for all.

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM Analytics: SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring Dashboards
entry.content:
I finally managed to display a dashboard shoing if the S/4 HANA systems are running. Somehow the data are only fetched every hour. Is it possible to change the parameter to fetch data every 10 minutes?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Central Finance (Cfin): Project Replication Enhancement for PREL/CRTD Status
entry.content:
Great insight, thanks a lot. 

If WBS is replicated, it need's the same project mask in the target system then in the source system, right? 

For Example, source system WBS A-1000-01-0001-00 and in target system is at the moment only mask WBS B-10000.00001.01. So  we would have provide the mask in source system before we replicate, correct?

entry.title: Re: Change technical object migration cockpit
entry.content:
Hello,

migration cockpit is intended for initial data load - not for change.

please you change functionality from the application itself.

regards, Sybille

entry.title: Re: Creating A Simple Mobile Attendance Application With Local Storage
entry.content:
I'm not sure about what you really want to get answer for, but if you don't know how to build application logic, then the best would be to follow the Build Apps tutorial. You can access it when you start a new project. You will see then a violet bar at the very bottom of the Build Apps screen. This bar is a link to the Build Apps tutorial with series of exercises, teaching you step by step all the basics, including how to build the application logic.

If you don't have this bar at the bottom of the screen, go to Help menu at the very top and check if the check mark next to the "I know everything about SAP Build Apps, hide the tutorial bar at the bottom" is checked - if so, uncheck it and you will see the tutorial.

entry.title: Segmentation Base Population Restrictions
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a request to restrict the base population of the Contacts Segmentation profile.  The requirement is to filter out contacts who have not engaged within the last 12 months.  Additionally, the requirement is to focus only on certain interaction types, such as web visits, forms submissions and message response (opens, click-thrus) - basically positive interactions that demonstrate intent.

One option would be to use re-usable segmentation building blocks, but ideally we'd like to have the population pre-filtered so users do not need to do anything.  I've also looked at applying a filter to the profile within the Segmentation Configuration app, but not sure this will cover the full requirements.

If anyone has any advice on how to address this requirement I'd be greatful!

Regards,

Bradley

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud and Props table
entry.content:
Introduction

This article is going to detail a technical table evoked in Data Maintenance and Cleanup of a SAP Commerce Cloud Project

Props table can grow up fast and need to be cleanup to avoid performance issue.

Props

Purpose of props table is to store large Item String attribute outside of main Item table. It is legacy used for those following Items

ExtensionsItem
coreSavedValues
coreSavedValueEntry
coreLanguage
processingCronJob
catalogCatalogVersionSyncCronJob
processingCompositeCronJob
impexImpExExportCronJob
impexImpExImportCronJob
basecommerceGeocodeAddressesCronJob
outboundsyncOutboundSyncCronJob
ruleengineservicesRuleEngineCronJob
solrfacetsearchSolrIndexerCronJob
solrcloudbackupSolrCloudBackupCronJob
ticketsystemSessionEventsRemovalCronJob
acceleratorservicesExportDataCronJob
workflowWorkflowActionTemplate
workflowAutomatedWorkflowActionTemplate
cms2CMSParagraphComponent
acceleratorcmsCMSTabParagraphComponent

When you're creating a new Item, you can add a new rows in Props table by declaring dontOptimize="true" in modifiers tag as following example

 

<itemtype code="CustomItem" extends="GenericItem" autocreate="true" generate="true">
    <deployment table="custoitem" typecode="..."/>
    <attributes>
        <attribute qualifier="name" generate="true" autocreate="true" type="java.lang.String">
            <persistence type="property"/>
            <modifiers optional="false" unique="false" dontOptimize="true"/>
        </attribute>
    </attributes>
</itemtype>

 

It is strongly not recommended to do that. If you still need to use dontOptimize="true", it is better to create a dedicated Props table for by adding propertytable as following

 

<itemtype code="CustomItem" extends="GenericItem" autocreate="true" generate="true">
    <deployment table="custoitem" typecode="..." propertytable="custoprops"/>
    <attributes>
        <attribute qualifier="name" generate="true" autocreate="true" type="java.lang.String">
            <persistence type="property"/>
            <modifiers optional="false" unique="false" dontOptimize="true"/>
        </attribute>
    </attributes>
</itemtype>

 

Cleanup

When we're doing data maintenance and cleanup is not rare to see lot of entries in Props table. It is often appear at top 10.

 

SELECT top 10 sc.name +'.'+ ta.name TableName, SUM(pa.rows) RowCnt
FROM
    sys.tables ta
INNER JOIN sys.partitions pa
    ON pa.OBJECT_ID = ta.OBJECT_ID
INNER JOIN sys.schemas sc
    ON ta.schema_id = sc.schema_id
WHERE ta.is_ms_shipped = 0 AND pa.index_id IN (1,0)
GROUP BY sc.name,ta.name
ORDER BY SUM(pa.rows) DESC

 

Normally when we cleanup an Item that depends on Props table the entries are removed too. 

We can investigate Props content and see what're the most impacting Items by running this following SQL query

 

SELECT top 10 ct.internalcode, p.name, p.itemtypepk, count(p.itemtypepk) FROM props p
JOIN composedtypes ct ON ct.pk = p.itemtypepk
GROUP by p.itemtypepk, ct.internalcode, p.name ORDER BY count(p.itemtypepk) desc

 

Often Cronjob, SavedValues, and SavedValueEntry Items are the most impacting. All Cronjobs with no trigger and end successfully can be removed (solr indexation, catalog sync, and so on). You can setup this following cleanup Cronjob for

Cleaning Up Cronjob

# CleanupCronJob / cleanupCronJobsPerformable
INSERT_UPDATE CronJob;code[unique=true];job(code);sessionLanguage(isoCode)[default=en]
; cronjobCleanUpCronjob; cleanupCronJobsPerformable;

INSERT_UPDATE Trigger; cronJob(code)[unique = true];cronExpression
# every night at 1AM
; cronjobCleanUpCronjob ; 0 1 * * * ?

SavedValues/SavedValueEntry Items are used to track BackOffice user action/change. It can be removed based on retention date by using Data Retention Framework

$oneWeeks = 604800

# SavedValues
INSERT_UPDATE FlexibleSearchRetentionRule;code[unique=true];searchQuery;retentionTimeSeconds;actionReference;
;savedValuesRule;"SELECT {i:pk}, {i:itemtype}
   FROM {SavedValues AS i}
   WHERE {i:modifiedTime} < ?CALC_RETIREMENT_TIME"; $oneWeeks; basicRemoveCleanupAction;
 
INSERT_UPDATE RetentionJob;code[unique=true];retentionRule(code);batchSize
; savedValuesCleanupJob; savedValuesRule; 1000

INSERT_UPDATE CronJob;code[unique=true];job(code);sessionLanguage(isoCode)[default=en]
; savedValuesCleanupCronJob; savedValuesCleanupJob;

Conclusion

Touching technical tables can be tricky and risky. This article shows you how to deal with Props table cleaning.

If you have any doubt, you should no try to write directly to any internal technical tables. Please ask SAP Expert Services to assist you when it is required to do this kind of action.

entry.title: Re: GR and GI Areas for Multiple Plants Linked to a Singl...
entry.content: sorry but the answer is not addressing the question, when i have separate GI and GR area for each plant, when i am doing picking how  to determine the destination GI area for that particular plant. Similarly for GR also.
